objective: Keep the repository documentation and handoff trail aligned with the consolidated runtime layout.
completed_changes: Moved the active helper modules into src/ and converted them to package-qualified imports.
Moved the factors package into src/factors/.
Moved the canonical monthly regime helper into src/regime_taa.py.
Updated integrated_regime_pipeline.py to import helpers from src and to remove active JL/YC sys.path dependencies.
Expanded the integrated notebook markdown so it reflects the source notebooks' narrative at the major stage level.
Updated README.md to describe the consolidated runtime layout, input root, output root, and transitional monthly filenames.
Kept the legacy JL and YC folders in place as reference material only.

new_features.name: Consolidated src package
new_features.description: All active helper code now lives under src/, with package-qualified imports from the integrated pipeline.

new_features.name: Refreshed monthly contract
new_features.description: The monthly stage is documented as a JL metrics-state workflow with Recall, Precision, and F1 selection against NBER recessions.

new_features.name: Direct execution path
new_features.description: The integrated pipeline runs directly from integrated_regime_pipeline.py against the consolidated helper modules.

new_features.name: Transitional compatibility outputs
new_features.description: Legacy monthly filenames such as regime_kappa_table.csv and table_diagnostics_summary.csv are documented as backward-compatibility artifacts only.

configuration_changes.name: Helper import style
configuration_changes.value: from src import data_cleaner as dc, data_loader as dl, factor_construction as fc, regime_model as rm, regime_utils as ru, regime_taa as rt

notes: The consolidation reused the existing scientific Python stack.
No requirements.txt changes were required for the move.

implementation_notes: src/data_loader.py resolves Data/ from the project root rather than src/Data.
The integrated pipeline now treats JL_regime_metrics_states_pipeline/regime_metrics_states.ipynb as the monthly source of truth.
The integrated notebook markdown is improved but still does not mirror every notebook-local markdown cell one-for-one.
The monthly bridge file remains outputs/integrated/regime_states/states_altdata_bnmeanrank_hmm_walkforward.csv and should retain the date/state/crisis/probability columns.

priority_tasks: If needed, backfill the remaining notebook-local markdown into integrated_regime_pipeline.py.
Keep the active import path centered on src/.
Preserve the YC bridge CSV contract and the monthly probability columns.
do_not_change: Do not reintroduce runtime imports from JL or YC helper folders.
Do not move canonical inputs out of Data/.
Do not add new third-party dependencies unless a later implementation pass proves they are required.
